text:
the FULL story:
1989: alright keiji yamagishi make this song for ninja gaiden ii
1990: cool song i dont care about it i wanna play the game
2004: version 1.99 of shuric scan by shuric com. is released
2005: t-port creates a keygen for it
t-port: hey soft maniac you think you could remix this song for shuric scan 1.99crk
soft maniac: creates remix, aptly titled "ryukenden"
2009: lets make a ytpmv out of this
2010: same
hispanicgirasol: this ytpmv fad is really cool ill going to do it with the room before it gets overused
later: shares the veg with their friends
one of their friends: i feel like doing shenanigans today ill go leak it
some guys who got ahold of it: veg replaces it but goes mostly unnoticed
2012: atp yer either an "i love veg replace" "LMFAO VEG REPLACE XD" or "i hate you for veg replacing"
2013: becomes popular among a few russian logokids (this is where it starts)
2014: ytpmv pbs kids scan is uploaded, blows up because youtube likes doing that and makes it known to the wider logokid community
2015: tnt2005/megan woodmansee/myscanvids and natus vincere popularize it further by uploading their own scans
logokids with none other than the fricking youtube video editor create the very first types of x shuric scans with are slides..., scan vs rounds, and x shuric scans
megan woodmansee (aka tnt2005 and myscanvids): hey im going to carbon copy this one video from 2011 (abandoned projects + veg replaced scans) and have the shuric scan veg link in the description just like it! :D
tnt2005 fans: gEe tHaNkS!!!!!
2017: many channels pop up that upload veg replacements and usually also veg replace the roomscan veg only further defacing shuric scan ytpmvs
2018-today: not much more to say to be honest, kind of just continued due to its popularity and i doubt it will die off anytime soon

text: Then the video zooms out on a backround of the same video, then repeats of the video just go up and down, and more repeats apear representing the drums, then the half of the video plays and then the video start playing the remix and MORE REPEATS APEAR PEAKING OF THE SCREENS AND THEN THE VIDEO START SWITCHING SIDES AND THE THE SCREEN TURNS GRAY (or grey depending on your region) WITH THE NUMBERS 06*. and then the video ends.
author: @98Demo

text: "	Opening with a fade, a pre-determined selection of the source video is played for 2 seconds. The clip then is resized to half its original dimensions, while a flipped and transparent clone appears in the background, echoing the melody. The clips are set to the tune of "Ryukenden Remix" by SofT MANiAC which accompany the visuals. Another section of the video follows, serving as the bass of the song, a third of the original size sliding upwards on the left and downwards on the right. New snares slide from each side, the same size as the bass, and the background switches from transparency to fully opaque due to a bass drum and hi-hat. A repetition of the original portion becomes visible in the background, until it emerges as the lead for the song, with an echo similar of that to the main melody. It is stable for about a third of the song, before it stops, where the main melody transitions into a different one and persists for another third. Then, the piece comes to an abrupt end with a gray colored overlay with a small white "06" reading in the Impact font. It lingers for some 3 seconds before finally ending." - 🤓 (i spent way too much time on this reply lol MAN NOW IT SAYS EDITED :SAJ:)
